case_title: LAW OFFICE OF ALEXANDRIA CARL VS. LOLITA COLEMAN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY LAW OFFICE OF ALEXANDRIA CARL AS TO DEFENDANT COLEMAN, LOLITA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-02-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-21-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COLEMAN, LOLITA
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-02-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-02-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE FILED BY LAW OFFICE OF ALEXANDRIA CARL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-02-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAW OFFICE OF ALEXANDRIA CARL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COLEMAN, LOLITA CASE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. COURT IS WITHOUT JURISDICTION TO HEAR AND DECIDE DECLARATORY RELIEF CLAIM IN ABSENCE OF DAMAGE CLAIM. CCP 116.220. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER (SC-108) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAW OFFICE OF ALEXANDRIA CARL
(SC-108) "ANSWER" ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT RECEIVED AND FILED. FILED BY DEFENDANT COLEMAN, LOLITA

ORDER ON (SC-108)REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SMALL CLAIMS). THE REQUEST IS DENIED. -JUDGE PRO TEM:DAVID LAVINE- EVEN IF THERE WERE SOME SYMPATHY FOR PLAINTIFF'S POSITION, PLAINTIFF MOVED TO CORRECT JUDGMENT WELL AFTER THE DEADLINE SET BY CODE. PLAINTIFF MIGHT HAVE BROUGHT AN ACTION TO VACATE OR CORRECT THE ARBITRATOR'S AWARD TO DEFENDANT AND FOR A TRIAL DE NOVO BUT INSTEAD MOVED FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF, WHICH, STANDING ALONE, THIS COURT HAS NO AUTHORITY TO ADJUDICATE.
